macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: US Stock Indexes Close Sharply Lower on Friday Amid Iran Conflict Escalation
items.summary: S&P 500 fell 1.51% to 6,506.48, Nasdaq dropped 2.01% to 21,647.61, and Dow declined 0.96% to 45,577.47, marking fourth straight weekly loss. VIX rose to 25.80 signaling heightened investor nervousness.

items.title: JPMorgan Slashes S&P 500 Year-End Target to 7,200 from 7,500 Amid Oil Price Surge
items.summary: Bank warns of potential dip to 6,000 if geopolitical tensions and rising oil from Iran war intensify, citing recession risks from oil spikes over 30%. S&P 500 down 5.1% year-to-date.

items.title: Natanz Nuclear Strike Escalates Iran War, Boosting Defense and Energy Stocks
items.summary: Weekend US-Israel strike on Iran's Natanz facility signals heightened conflict, prompting buy recommendations for LMT ($627, target $720), MU ($448, target $535), and CVX ($202, target $225). Market shifts to bear regime with high risk.

items.title: Fed Rate Cut Expectations Fade as Oil-Driven Inflation Rises
items.summary: Rate futures indicate Federal Reserve may raise rates by 2026 due to higher oil prices from Iran conflict boosting inflation expectations. Investors await inflation data and Fed signals.

items.title: Tech Stocks Tumble, Super Micro Computer Plunges 33% on Smuggling Charges
items.summary: Nvidia, Tesla down over 3%, Alphabet, Meta, Microsoft off 2%; Super Micro Computer shares crater 33% after AI tech export smuggling reports. Energy stocks mark 13th weekly gain.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: U.S. Regulators Provide New Clarity on Digital Asset Classification
items.summary: A key U.S. regulator issued clarification on digital asset classification, reducing legal uncertainties and boosting prospects for institutional products and infrastructure development. This is seen as a major positive driver amid ongoing market architecture formation.

items.title: Bitcoin Slides Below $69,000 as Fear & Greed Index Hits 10
items.summary: Bitcoin dropped to $68,824 on March 22, 2026, with the total crypto market cap falling 2.45% to $2.36 trillion and the Fear & Greed Index sinking to 10 amid weakening sentiment.

items.title: Senators Reach Compromise on Crypto Yield; Coinbase Launches Tokenized Bitcoin Yield Fund
items.summary: U.S. senators agreed on a compromise for crypto yield regulations, advancing clarity, while Coinbase introduced a tokenized Bitcoin yield fund signaling rising institutional demand.

items.title: Bitcoin Holds $70K Support Amid Altcoin Declines and Institutional Rotation
items.summary: Bitcoin maintained support at $70,434 with 0.75% gains, while altcoins like ETH (-0.5%) and SOL (-0.8%) fell, indicating institutional capital shifting to BTC as a defensive asset.

items.title: Pi Network Launches Protocol 20 and Testnet Launchpad
items.summary: Pi Network's Protocol 20 and Testnet Launchpad went live, enabling smart contracts and driving a 7.14% price surge amid heightened ecosystem sentiment.

items.title: RIVER Token Surges 8.9% Ahead of Major Token Unlock
items.summary: RIVER rose 8.9% to $25.46 in anticipation of a 1.11M token unlock worth $28.28M on March 22, supported by strong $38.7M trading volume.

items.title: US Senator Introduces Bill Blocking Federal Bailouts for Digital Assets
items.summary: A U.S. senator proposed legislation to prevent federal bailouts for digital assets, amid broader pro-crypto regulatory shifts like the GENIUS Act for stablecoins.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: NVIDIA Releases Nemotron 3 Super: 120B Hybrid Mamba-Transformer MoE Model
items.summary: NVIDIA launched Nemotron 3 Super, a 120B parameter hybrid Mamba-Transformer Mixture of Experts model with 12B active parameters, 1M context length, and 2.2x throughput compared to GPT-OSS-120B, including pricing, benchmarks, and API details.

items.title: Post-Training Survey: GRPO, DAPO, RLVR Replace RLHF as Dominant Stack
items.summary: A technical survey details how GRPO, DAPO, RLVR, and synthetic self-play have overtaken RLHF in post-training for LLMs in 2026, explaining the changes and reasons behind the shift.

items.title: Cisco and OpenAI Launch Codex AI Agent for Enterprises
items.summary: Cisco and OpenAI introduced Codex, an AI agent designed to transform enterprise engineering by automating development tasks and boosting productivity.

items.title: OpenAI Partners with U.S. Department of Energy on AI Research
items.summary: OpenAI collaborated with the U.S. DOE to advance AI applications in energy, climate, and scientific research, aiming for sustainable innovation.

items.title: Northrop Grumman and Shield AI Demonstrate Mission Autonomy Flight
items.summary: Northrop Grumman's Talon IQ testbed successfully flew using Shield AI's Hivemind software for combat maneuvers, showcasing rapid integration of third-party AI autonomy on an open-architecture platform.

items.title: WIPO Launches AI Infrastructure Interchange in Geneva
items.summary: The World Intellectual Property Organization launched the AI Infrastructure Interchange to address technical challenges at the intersection of AI and the creative economy, involving a network of 90+ experts.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Spring Gaming Trends in 2026: PlayStation Shifts PC Strategy
items.summary: PlayStation is adjusting its PC strategy amid evolving trends in the $200 billion gaming industry. NVIDIA sparks debate and Xbox teases future developments.

items.title: Garena Free Fire MAX Redeem Codes Released for March 22, 2026
items.summary: Garena has issued new redeem codes for Free Fire Max players in India, offering free diamonds, skins, weapons, and character outfits via the official rewards site.

items.title: Marathon Receives Final Review Verdict
items.summary: Bungie's Marathon, released on March 5, 2026 for PS5, Windows, Xbox Series X/S, gets its final review from Solis Magazine.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: PlayStation Network Experiences Widespread Outage
items.summary: PSN suffered a major outage on March 21, 2026, affecting multiple services including account management, gaming, and PlayStation Store, with Sony confirming issues but reports indicating gradual recovery.
